arts.ttl: Martin Odegaard rates Arsenal's chances of catching Liverpool in title race
arts.sum: Arsenal are 16 points behind Liverpool at the top of the Premier League table ahead of their must-win clash against Manchester United at Old Trafford on Sunday afternoon

arts.ttl: Maguire, Ugarte, Amad - Manchester United injury news and return dates ahead of Arsenal fixture
arts.sum: All the very latest on the Man United injury front ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash with Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Ayden Heaven decision and Chido Obi call - How Manchester United should line up vs Arsenal
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, Tyrone Marshall, George Smith)
arts.sum: Man United will welcome Arsenal to Old Trafford in the Premier League on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Arsenal injuries: Every player out of Man Utd clash
arts.sum: Every Arsenal player missing from their Premier League clash with Man Utd on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Man Utd injuries: Every player out of Arsenal clash
arts.sum: Every Man Utd player sidelined with injury for the Premier League clash with Arsenal on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Manchester United initiate transfer 'talks' as Tottenham prepare bid
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United transfer news and gossip includes an update on Jean-Philippe Mateta and Antoine Semenyo

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim needs a chat with players - treat them like Paul Scholes and Ryan Giggs were
arts.sum: Dimitar Berbatov has urged Ruben Amorim to confide in his senior players amid Manchester United's struggles - much like Sir Alex Ferguson did with Paul Scholes and Ryan Giggs

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres transfer stance emerges amid huge £54m update and Arsenal and Chelsea links
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea-linked Viktor Gyokeres is keeping his options open ahead of the summer transfer window after enjoying a high-profile season with Sporting Clube de Portugal. All the top clubs in Europe are going very strong for Gyokeres in the summer.

arts.ttl: 'I left Man Utd to join Arsenal - I had a great time at one club but support the other more'
arts.sum: Mikael Silvestre had the pleasure of representing both Manchester United and Arsenal, playing in some of the most heated clashes ever between the two Premier League rivals

arts.ttl: Manchester United predicted line-up vs Arsenal as wing-back problem exposed and Casemiro starts
arts.sum: Man United will be looking to record back-to-back Premier League wins for the first time in almost a year when Arsenal visit Old Trafford on Sunday.
